title: Grilled Kenyan Paneer Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful recipe featuring paneer cheese, inspired by Kenyan cuisine. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: mellow
ingredients.notes: mellow sauce or yogurt for marinating

instructions: 2. In a bowl, whisk together mellow, cheesy, and kenyan spice.
3. Add paneer cubes to the marinade and mix well.
5. Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot, topped with additional grated cheese if desired.
